cards.title: $25 Off Your First Drip
cards.body: New to Keka's Blessings? Enjoy $25 off your first IV vitamin drip when you book your introductory wellness session.

cards.title: Flexible Financing With Cherry
cards.body: Spread the cost of your wellness journey over time with 0% APR options and no hard credit check. Approvals up to $30,000.
